message_text: I want to give an update about my remaining loan payment. I will not be able to pay this month.

I’m an AI agent acting on behalf of Nira Finance, and this conversation is being logged. I’m contacting you about your Nira Finance loan ending ****4831. I understand you will not be able to pay this month. Is your situation due to unemployment or another hardship?
Yes, I lost my job, and I can’t pay anything right now.
Understood. You’ve said you lost your job and cannot pay anything right now. I’m marking this for hardship review and passing it to the next step.

I already told you I’m unemployed and can’t commit to any payment right now.

Understood. Based on what you’ve stated, I’m not asking for a payment commitment right now. Nira’s policy does not allow extensions beyond 30 days, and exact approved hardship resolution terms are not available from the data I can confirm here. I’ve recorded that you are unemployed, cannot pay now, and may be able to review options around 2026-04-20. We’ll limit follow-up to the next policy-compliant review step or an approved option.
